title: festuca elatior var. fallax
intro: Festuca elatior var. fallax, commonly known as tall fescue or meadow fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving digestion, due to its high content of vitamins and minerals. In herbal preparations, Festuca elatior var. fallax is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
